character_buff.name: Let the Show Begin!
character_buff.description: The performance officially begins with a greeting announcing the start of the performance.

effects: When cast, [Let the Show Begin!]
When cast, [Magicians High] Level 1
[Let the Show Begin!] Duration: 600 seconds
Attack Rating +1
Attack Power +30%
Casting Time -10%
Intelligence +5
[Magicians High] Level 1 Duration: 90 seconds
Casting Time -10%, Movement Speed +20%

stances.name: Hat Trick

skills.name: Whats in my hat?
skills.description: Tap your hat as a preparatory gesture for various magic spells to arouse curiosity.

effects: If there is no [Response] when cast, apply [Response - Applause]
If there is [Response] when cast, refresh the duration of [Response]
When cast, reduce the cooldown of [Hat Trick] stance skill by 4 seconds
[Response - Applause] Duration 45 seconds
Attack power +10%, attack power +20% to monsters, and mental penetration +10
[Response - Cheer] Duration 45 seconds
Attack rating +1, attack power +20%, attack power +40% to monsters, and mental penetration +20
[Response - Zeal] Duration 45 seconds
Attack rating up to +2 in proportion to the buff level
Attack power +30%, attack power +60% to monsters, and mental penetration +30
Additional effect when casting an attack skill
If there is no [Response] when cast, apply [Response - Applause]
If there is [Response] when cast, refresh the duration of [Response]

[Response - Cheer] Duration 45 seconds

skills.name: Hat Levitation
skills.description: Use your hat to fly up and fly to the desired location. Sometimes it doesnt go as planned.

effects: During casting, until landing, [Unable to be hit]
When in [Let the Show Begin!] state, skill damage to monsters is tripled.
If there is no [Response] when casting, [Response - Applause] is applied.
When in [Response - Applause] or [Response - Cheer] state, the next level of [Response] is applied.
[Response - Zeal] When in this state, [Response - Zeal] is removed and [Response - Applause] is applied.
When [Magicians High] Level 2 is applied, double skill damage to monsters.
When [Magicians High] Level 2 lasts 90 seconds, casting time -15%, movement speed +30%
During casting, until landing, [Unable to be hit]
When in [Let the Show Begin!] state, skill damage to monsters is tripled.
If there is no [Response] when casting, [Response - Applause] is applied.
When in [Response - Applause] or [Response - Cheer] state, the next level of [Response] is applied.
[Response - Zeal] When in this state, [Response - Zeal] is removed and [Response - Applause] is applied.
When [Magicians High] Level 2 is applied, double skill damage to monsters.
When [Magicians High] Level 2 lasts 90 seconds, casting time -15%, movement speed +30%

skills.name: Souvenir
skills.description: Ill give you a cake I used in another magic trick as a souvenir. Its a little provocative.

skills.name: Great Escape
skills.description: Fires a powerful magic ball at the target, causing them to escape from this world.

effects: When in [Let the Show Begin!] state 3x skill damage to monsters

skills.name: Closer
skills.description: Attacks enemies by detonating fireworks that should explode in the sky on the ground.

effects: Can only be cast while in [Magicians High] state.
When in [Let the Show Begin!] state, skill damage to monsters is tripled.
Removes [Response] when cast.
Removes [Magicians High] when hit.
When in [Response - Zeal] state, resets cooldowns for [Hat Trick] stance skills except this skill.
During casting, [Cannot be hit].
Skill damage to monsters is quadrupled.
